references.reviewedEvidence: Published December 18, 2024. The sidebar can be reordered, hidden behind More, and paired with data-rich tables.
rejected: workspace-level personalization beyond the local route

references.reviewedEvidence: Published January 22, 2026. The redesign moves navigation into a resizable sidebar, keeps consistent tabs, and preserves team/project context.
borrowed: collapsible secondary chrome instead of detached pages
rejected: bottom-bar mobile metaphor for governed clinical review

references.reviewedEvidence: Updated September 24, 2025. The dashboard preserves list/grid choice, search, and project selection inside one dashboard shell.
Current Carbon guidance says data tables belong in the main content area, should avoid cramped containers, and may expand into a dedicated page or side panel when detail becomes too dense.
borrowed: selectable rows with clear primary actions
rejected: generic enterprise-table chrome without clinical context

references.reviewedEvidence: Current pattern guidance keeps context in the main view with side panels and uses warning stages plus summaries of changes for higher-impact edits.
Current NHS guidance requires descriptive headings, visible focus, skip links for long filter groups, and meaning that does not rely on colour or position alone.
borrowed: multiple non-colour cues for delta classes
rejected: position-only instructions for compare or jump controls
